title: اليقظة الذهنية
citation: Kabat-Zinn, J. (1990). Full catastrophe living: Using the wisdom of your body and mind to face stress, pain, and illness. Delacorte Press.
content: [CONTENT AUTHOR REQUIRED] Gulf Arabic adaptation (~350 words). Cover: mindfulness as secular attention practice — fully compatible with Islamic practice; involves no beliefs or rituals; can be done clothed and seated anywhere. Khaleeji register.
